description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build .NET Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow with an optional ice_version input. The workflow has two jobs: build-slice-compilers, which builds slice compilers for multiple platforms (macos, windows, linux) and uploads the compiler artifacts; and pack-dotnet, which runs on Windows, downloads the compiler artifacts, sets up .NET, restores C++ dependencies, builds and signs .NET assemblies, packs .NET packages, and uploads the NuGet packages.
